name: inno-agent
desc: An open-source personal learning agent with three-layer memory (learner profile / wiki knowledge base / cross-conversation recall), a proactive scheduler, pers…
descFull: An open-source personal learning agent with three-layer memory (learner profile / wiki knowledge base / cross-conversation recall), a proactive scheduler, personal IM channels, and a workspace-scoped Practice Lab — built on the Pi SDK.
